title: Introduction to Language Studies (Extended)
outline: The purpose of this course is to augment and support its co-requisite course: ASL1301S (Introduction to Applied Language Studies). It aims to improve students’ performance by enhancing their grasp of key ideas and concepts, and by developing their mastery of the disciplinary discourse. It provides additional pedagogic enrichment in the form of regular Plus Tutorials that extend into Writing Hub exercises and consultations. In these tutorials, students will receive explicit support around the co - requisite course assignments and detailed feedback on their written work.
assessment: This course will be assessed on a Pass/Fail basis. In order to receive a pass grade, students will be required to complete at least 80% of all course requirements (attendance at tutorials, submission of exercises, etc.)
